adrenaline.name: Adrenaline
adrenaline.shortDesc: At 1/2 or less max HP, this Pokemon's Speed is 1.5x.
adrenaline.desc: This Pokemon's Speed is multiplied by 1.5 while it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.

allure.name: Allure
allure.shortDesc: On switch-in, lowers opposite-gender adjacent foes' evasiveness by 1.
allure.desc: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the evasiveness of adjacent opposing Pokemon of the opposite gender by 1 stage.

braveheart.name: Brave Heart
braveheart.shortDesc: When a foe raises its stats, this Pokemon's Attack rises.
braveheart.desc: When an opposing Pokemon raises one of its stats, this Pokemon's Attack is raised.

conditioning.name: Conditioning
conditioning.shortDesc: Repeated hits in succession deal progressively less damage to this Pokemon.
conditioning.desc: Successive uses of moves against this Pokemon deal reduced damage, decreasing by 25% each successive hit in the chain.

content.name: Content
content.shortDesc: Heals 1/16 max HP at end of turn if this Pokemon did not use a damaging move.
content.desc: At the end of each turn in which this Pokemon did not use a Physical or Special move, it restores 1/16 of its maximum HP.

conundrum.name: Conundrum
conundrum.shortDesc: 30% chance to confuse a Pokemon that makes contact with this Pokemon.
conundrum.desc: If this Pokemon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance to become confused.

discretion.name: Discretion
discretion.shortDesc: This Pokemon does not lose PP when its move misses.
discretion.desc: If this Pokemon's move misses, that move does not consume PP.

eccentric.name: Eccentric
eccentric.shortDesc: Special Attack is 1.5x, but the accuracy of this Pokemon's special moves is reduced.
eccentric.desc: This Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5, but the accuracy of its Special moves is reduced by 20%.

eventide.name: Eventide
eventide.shortDesc: At night: Sp. Atk is 1.5x. During day: Defense is 1.5x.
eventide.desc: At night, this Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5. During the day, its Defense is multiplied by 1.5.

feedback.name: Feedback
feedback.shortDesc: When hit by a non-contact move, attacker loses 1/8 max HP.
feedback.desc: If this Pokemon is hit by a non-contact Physical or Special move, the attacker loses 1/8 of its maximum HP.

feisty.name: Feisty
feisty.shortDesc: Attack is 1.5x while facing a higher-level foe.
feisty.desc: This Pokemon's Attack is multiplied by 1.5 when facing a higher-level opposing Pokemon.

forage.name: Forage
forage.shortDesc: After battle, may generate a held Berry if not already holding an item.
forage.desc: After winning a battle, this Pokemon has a chance to generate a held Berry if it is not already holding an item.

fullforce.name: Full Force
fullforce.shortDesc: Variable-power moves always use their maximum Base Power.
fullforce.desc: This Pokemon's moves with variable Base Power always use their highest possible Base Power.

iceslick.name: Ice Slick
iceslick.shortDesc: In snow, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled and it is immune to weather chip.
iceslick.desc: In snow/hail-like weather, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled and it does not take weather damage.

ironjaw.name: Iron Jaw
ironjaw.shortDesc: Biting moves used by this Pokemon have 1.5x power.
ironjaw.desc: This Pokemon's biting moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.

malice.name: Malice
malice.shortDesc: Opponents take 1.5x secondary/indirect damage while this Pokemon is active.
malice.desc: Secondary and indirect damage received by opposing Pokemon is multiplied by 1.5 while this Pokemon is active.

mooch.name: Mooch
mooch.shortDesc: Can consume Berries held by other active Pokemon.
mooch.desc: This Pokemon can consume held Berries from foes or allies, prioritizing foe Berries first.

orbitaltide.name: Orbital Tide
orbitaltide.shortDesc: Gravity is active while this Pokemon is on the field.
orbitaltide.desc: While this Pokemon is active, Gravity is applied.

overshadow.name: Overshadow
overshadow.shortDesc: Shorter opposing Pokemon have their Attack and Sp. Atk halved.
overshadow.desc: While this Pokemon is active, opposing Pokemon shorter than it have their Attack and Special Attack multiplied by 0.5.

perforate.name: Perforate
perforate.shortDesc: User's same-type moves ignore target immunities.
perforate.desc: This Pokemon's same-type attacks ignore type immunities and treat those interactions as neutral effectiveness.

permafrost.name: Permafrost
permafrost.shortDesc: In snow, this Pokemon's Defense is 1.5x and it is immune to weather chip.
permafrost.desc: In snow/hail-like weather, this Pokemon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5 and it does not take weather damage.

pollution.name: Pollution
pollution.shortDesc: Summons acid rain that chips non-Poison/Steel Pokemon each turn.
pollution.desc: On switch-in, summons acid rain that damages Pokemon each turn except Poison- and Steel-types; this Pokemon is immune to that weather damage.

psychout.name: Psych Out
psychout.shortDesc: On switch-in, lowers adjacent foes' Sp. Atk by 1.
psychout.desc: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Special Attack of adjacent opposing Pokemon by 1 stage.

reactiveshielding.name: Reactive Shielding
reactiveshielding.shortDesc: When hit, raises the corresponding defense and lowers the other.
reactiveshielding.desc: When this Pokemon is hit, it raises the defensive stat corresponding to the move category and lowers the other defensive stat.

scavenger.name: Scavenger
scavenger.shortDesc: Restores 1/4 max HP when this Pokemon KOes a foe.
scavenger.desc: When this Pokemon knocks out an opposing Pokemon, it restores 25% of its maximum HP.

siphon.name: Siphon
siphon.shortDesc: Contact moves may drain HP from target.
siphon.desc: Contact moves used by this Pokemon that do not already drain HP have a chance to restore HP equal to half the damage dealt.

spectrum.name: Spectrum
spectrum.shortDesc: May change this Pokemon's primary type based on the target.
spectrum.desc: This Pokemon's primary type changes depending on the opposing Pokemon's color.

stubborn.name: Stubborn
stubborn.shortDesc: At 1/2 or less max HP, this Pokemon's Defense is 1.5x.
stubborn.desc: This Pokemon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5 while it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.

sunbathe.name: Sunbathe
sunbathe.shortDesc: In sun, this Pokemon heals 1/16 max HP each turn.
sunbathe.desc: During intense sunlight, this Pokemon restores 1/16 of its maximum HP at the end of each turn.

teamplayer.name: Team Player
teamplayer.shortDesc: In doubles, stat boosts for this side are increased by +1 stage.
teamplayer.desc: In double battles, stat stage increases affecting this Pokemon or its ally are increased by an additional 1 stage.
